Feedback? Ideas? Complaints? Suggestions? Request for report about other area? send me a message!
This page was generated on 2021-02-20. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




Proposed edits at this page are so obvious that automatic edit makes sense.

blacklisted connection with known replacement
it is a typical wrong link and it has an obvious replacement, brand:wikipedia/brand:wikidata should be used instead
Key Food - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific eror is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( way(241818760)['wikidata'='Q6398037']['wikipedia'='en:Key Food']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['blacklisted connection with known replacement']

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q18388714 vs Q9022625
Lime Lake - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q12125828 vs Q3100558
Geneseo - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q7431164 vs Q6122376
Schenevus - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q35731186 vs Q3825699
Lake Flower - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q5471408 vs Q5470967
Fort Jay - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific eror is present:
